paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32 as of July 23, 2026, representing a decrease of 3.95 percent from the prior close and a 20.9 percent decline over the past 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "Project Matador: World’s largest AI data center coming to Panhandle" from NewsChannel 10 on MSN and "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, both published on July 23, 2026. These articles discuss Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus, and the company's admission of shares of Common Stock, respectively.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including the appointment of new officers, the resignation of director Miles Everson, and the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there is one Form 4 filing in the feed, indicating insider activity.
